item.title: Stolpersteine project honors Holocaust victims - Informação Lisboa
item.description: Stolpersteine project honors Holocaust victims Informação Lisboa

item.title: POLACH HANUŠ
item.description: Address: U SMALTOVNY 1563/19, PRAHA 7 Born 10. 12. 1899 Last residence before deportation: Prague V Transport Cc, no. 628 (20. 11. 1942, Prague -> Terezín) Transport Ds, no. 1909 (18. 12. 1943, Terezín -> Auschwitz) Murdered Holocaust database Stolperstein za Hanuše Polacha U Smaltovny 19 | Praha 7
